Chaotic Suns - Beta v0.2.0-beta
====================================

A cosmic survival game where you guide a civilization
orbiting multiple chaotic suns.

REQUIREMENTS:
  - Python 3.12+
  - pip install -r requirements.txt

TO RUN:
  python3 main.py

TO TEST:
  python3 test_all.py

CONTROLS:
  Space       Pause/Resume
  E           Prediction Mode
  H           Help
  T           Research Lab (tech tree)
  1-4         Launch probes
  Arrows      Pan view
  +/-         Zoom
  F5/F9       Quick save/load
  Esc         Menu

FEEDBACK:
  Please report bugs and suggestions!

Built: 0.2.0-beta
